# Forward Email

> Free email forwarding and hosting for custom domains. Open-source, privacy-focused, and trusted by 500,000+ users.

Forward Email provides email forwarding, IMAP/POP3 hosting, SMTP sending, newsletters, and a developer API for custom domains. Free forwarding with unlimited aliases. Paid plans from $3/mo for full hosting with 10GB encrypted storage. 100% open-source on GitHub. Founded in 2017.

## Key Facts

- Free email forwarding for unlimited custom domains and aliases
- Full email hosting with IMAP, POP3, and SMTP access
- Quantum-resistant, end-to-end encrypted storage
- 100% open-source codebase on GitHub
- RESTful API and MCP server for developers
- Supports SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI, MTA-STS, and DANE
- Trusted by Netflix Games, Disney, The Linux Foundation, and Ubuntu

## Docs

- [FAQ](https://forwardemail.net/en/faq): Frequently asked questions and troubleshooting
- [Developer Docs](https://forwardemail.net/en/blog/docs): Comprehensive developer documentation
- [Email API](https://forwardemail.net/en/email-api): RESTful API reference and examples
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://forwardemail.net/en/api-spec.json): Machine-readable API specification
- [MCP Server](https://forwardemail.net/en/blog/docs/mcp): Model Context Protocol server for AI integration

## Guides

- [Quick Start](https://forwardemail.net/en/faq#how-do-i-get-started-and-set-up-email-forwarding): Setup email forwarding in 2 minutes
- [DNS Setup Guides](https://forwardemail.net/en/guides): Step-by-step guides for 100+ DNS providers
- [Self-Hosting](https://forwardemail.net/en/blog/docs/self-hosted-email): Run your own Forward Email instance

## Product

- [Pricing](https://forwardemail.net/en/private-business-email): Free, Enhanced ($3/mo), and Team ($9/mo) plans
